summary: Created floating refresh button following the same factory pattern as share-button. Added `src/ui/refresh-button.ts` (createRefreshButton function), `src/styles/refresh-button.css` (positioned at bottom: 136px, stacking above share button), and wired it into `src/main.ts` with a click handler that generates a new seed, updates the URL, and rerenders without browser reload. All 474 tests pass.
